zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly於1250年4月出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯格洛斯時，他的父親Patrick de Chaworth31歲，母親Hawise de London39歲。他於1276年與Lady Isabella de Beauchamp在英國格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他在威爾士卡馬特史爾被列為lord of kidwelly。他去世於1283年7月7日在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly于1250年4月出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯格洛斯时，他的父亲Patrick de Chaworth31岁，母亲Hawise de London39岁。他于1276年与Lady Isabella de Beauchamp在英国格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他在威尔士卡馬特史爾被列为lord of kidwelly。他去世于1283年7月7日在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chaworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Haworth (Yorkshire), probably from Old English haga ‘hedge, enclosure’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Howarth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Howarth in Rochdale (Lancashire), possibly from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + worth ‘enclosure’. The name may have been confused with Haworth .

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly was born in April 1250, in Glos, Calvados, Normandy, France, his father, Patrick de Chaworth, was 31 and his mother, Hawise de London, was 39. He married Lady Isabella de Beauchamp in 1276, in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as lord of kidwelly in Carmarthenshire, Wales. He died on 7 July 1283, in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly est né en avril 1250, à Glos, Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Patrick de Chaworth, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Hawise de London, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabella de Beauchamp en 1276, à Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est lord of kidwelly à Carmarthenshire, Galles. Il est décédé le 7 juillet 1283, à Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly im April 1250 in Glos, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Patrick de Chaworth 31 und seine Mutter Hawise de London 39. Er hat 1276 in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England Lady Isabella de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als lord of kidwelly in Carmarthenshire, Wales aufgeführt. Er starb am 7. Juli 1283 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly è nato il nel aprile 1250 nel Glos, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Patrick de Chaworth, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Hawise de London, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Lady Isabella de Beauchamp nel 1276, nel Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come lord of kidwelly nel Carmarthenshire, Galles. Morì il 7 luglio 1283, nel Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwellyが1250年4月にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスグロスで生まれた時，父Patrick de Chaworthは31歳，母Hawise de Londonは39歳であった。1276年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアケンプスフォードでLady Isabella de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。ウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでの職業はlord of kidwellyと記録されている。彼は1283年7月7日にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアキドウエリーで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly(이)가 1250년 4월 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 그로스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Patrick de Chaworth(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise de London(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1276년 영국 그루스스터실르 케프스퍼드에서 Lady Isabella de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 웨일스 카마테실르에서 lord of kidwelly이었다. 그는 1283년 7월 7일 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 키드웰이에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly nasceu em abril de 1250, em Glos, Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Patrick de Chaworth, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de London, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Isabella de Beauchamp em 1276, em Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como lord of kidwelly em Carmarthenshire, Gales. Ele faleceu em 7 de julho de 1283, em Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly родился апрель 1250 г. в местности глос, калвадос, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Patrick de Chaworth было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Hawise de London, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabella de Beauchamp в 1276 г. в местности кемпсфорд, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии lord of kidwelly в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс. Он умер 7 июля 1283 г. в местности кидвелли, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly nació en abril de 1250, en Glos, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Patrick de Chaworth, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Hawise de London, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Lady Isabella de Beauchamp en 1276, en Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era lord of kidwelly en Carmarthenshire, Gales. Murió el 7 de julio de 1283, en Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años.
